wbTabItems.wbText:

Ember-Roasted Bone Marrow — sourdough toast, chimichurri, pickled shallots — $19

Roasted Half Chicken — preserved lemon jus, roasted garlic, wilted greens — $38

Pan-Seared Halibut — saffron beurre blanc, fennel, cherry tomatoes — $44

Dark Chocolate Fondant — salted caramel, vanilla bean ice cream — $14

Crème Brûlée — Madagascar vanilla, seasonal berries — $13

Cheese Board — selection of three artisan cheeses, honeycomb, candied walnuts — $22

Affogato — double espresso over house-made gelato — $11
